title: Ivyline Monza Vintage Grey Planter Plant Pot Indoor Flower Pot, Planter for Small House Plants Succulents Cacti (Grey, 13cm)

description: Ivyline Monza Vintage Planter in Grey – Premium Glaze and Premium Quality – Waterproof and Made in Europe – Floral Patterned Plant Pot About this item - Premium glaze – Treated with a premium glaze to keep your Ivyline Monza Vintage Planter in Grey looking fresh and pristine, this is the pot you need on your windowsill. - Premium quality – Ivyline’s Monza floral patterned plant pot in grey is a premium quality product that will have a lasting impact over a long time. - Waterproof – This Monza vintage planter is waterproof, making suitable for keeping your houseplants in when it comes to watering time. - Made in Europe – Ivyline aims to keep our carbon footprint down by crafting products closer to home, reducing emissions. - Vintage design – Why reinvent something that’s so classically stylish when you can have a traditional pattern made new again? Ivyline Monza Vintage Planter in Grey The Ivyline Monza Vintage Planter in Grey is the modern vintage-looking planter you need to express classic style in the most practical way. Made with a premium glaze and waterproofed, the premium quality Monza floral patterned plant pot provides you with the perfect way to display your top houseplants. Style with a timeless parlour palm for instant chic. With three sizes to choose from, you’ll have to collect them all to keep all your houseplants in!
